transcript: You call once more, I'm gonna have your goddamn number checked.
I'm gonna have your goddamn number checked, you asshole.
Come here right now. I'll wait for you, you asshole.
Thought you were kiddin'. Nobody's ever called and asked us if we take pig bowel lips.
We got a trace on this fuckin' phone, sucker. Stay on the phone about two more seconds, man.
'[repeated in background, delayed]' We got a trace on this fuckin' phone, sucker. We got a trace on this fuckin' phone, sucker.
Come on down. I recognize your fuckin' voice. You think I'm stupid?
I know who this is! I know who you are.
'[delayed]' We got a trace on this fuckin' phone, sucker.
[scoffs] If you can kick my ass, I'll give you a hundred dollars. Why don't you come down here right now?
Come in here. Why don't you just show your face? Come on. Come on. Get here, you little chickenshit. It's all yours, you're a little pussy.
'[delayed]' We got a trace on this fuckin' phone, sucker.
I can't take any pig bowel. If you have, uhh... diamonds, gold, uh, firearms, stereo equipment, CDs, movies, anything like that, television... But I can't take any pig bowel.
Fuck you. You know, I am probably ten years, twenty years older than you, you little fuckin'-- '[repeated]' Fuck you.
You wanna get my name and address now your son's cost you and [unintelligible]
Why would I take the bowel of a pig?
So why don't you go play with yourself. Huh?
--Probably playing with yourself right now, you-- '[repeated]' Fuck you.
[laughing] Oh, Jesus. Well... [laughs] Bring whatever you want down, and we'll see how it works out, pal.
I told you, I don't take in pig bowels.
[laughs] What are you, being a smartass?
Let me [unintelligible] you, I don't know what you're talking about.
Piss on you, you shit-ass. I'll wait for you, you asshole. '[repeated]' Piss on you, you shit-ass.
Piss on you, you shit-ass. I'll wait for you, you asshole.
'[sampled, looped]' She's gone crazy! She's gone crazy!
'[sampled]' Get me a drink. Oh, go on, then.
'[sampled]' I used to wait for you at the bus stop.
'[sampled, pitch-shifted]' Learn a new skill. Learn a new skill.
'[sampled]' And what did he just ask you?
'[sampled, looped]' I said I want a drink. I said I want a drink.
